TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Bulbul, title = Bulbul, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bulbul} }

S.FORM: Bulbul Itiniay i Haiduan Cen no Taitung ko Bulbul a niyaro', 58 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 246 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 233 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 13 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 84%, Amis 2%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 1%, roma 7%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~b~vo~u~uɾb~b~vo~u~uɾ itiniaj i ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u b~b~vo~u~uɾb~b~vo~u~uɾ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Bulbul Itiniay i Haiduan Cen no Taitung ko Bulbul a niyaro', 58 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 246 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 233 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 13 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 84%, Amis 2%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 1%, roma 7%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~b~vo~u~uɾb~b~vo~u~uɾ itiniaj i ħaiɬ~ɮo~u~uan ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u b~b~vo~u~uɾb~b~vo~u~uɾ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, amis *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
